ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item (e.g., g1, g2) */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the segment the item belongs to */,
  "sub_segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-segment the item belongs to */,
  "permissions" INTEGER /* Permissions for the item (read/write) */,
  "lifecycle" INTEGER /* Lifecycle of the item (function, program, indefinite) */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., code, data) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Current version of the item */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the item */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the item */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the item (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_lifecycle FOREIGN KEY ("lifecycle") REFERENCES lifecycles ("lifecycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_sub_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_segment_id") REFERENCES sub_segments ("sub_segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_permissions FOREIGN KEY ("permissions") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment (e.g., data, code) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the segment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the segment was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the segment */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the segment was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the segment (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segments_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_segments" (
  "sub_segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-segment */,
  "sub_segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-segment (e.g., bss, const) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-segment */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the segment the sub-segment belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the sub-segment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the sub-segment was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the sub-segment */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the sub-segment was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sub-segment (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_segments_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_segments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_segments_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission type */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the permission */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifecycles" (
  "lifecycle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifecycle type */,
  "lifecycle_name" TEXT /* Name of the lifecycle (e.g., function, program, indefinite) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lifecycle */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the lifecycle */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the lifecycle was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the lifecycle */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the lifecycle was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifecycle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifecycles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifecycles_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the project */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_project_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-item mapping */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the item was assigned to the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the mapping (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_project_mapping_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_project_mapping_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_project_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-user mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the user was assigned to the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the mapping (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_project_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_project_mapping_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the item */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the item */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_versions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)
